title: Career Planning
questions: What kind of job do you think you will get after college?
Which do you think is more important: money or job security in a job and why?
Who do you think has the best job and why?
What do you think is the best job and why?
When do you believe a person should start planning for their career?
Why would someone want to change careers?
Why do you thnk it is or is not important to plan your career?
Who do you know personally that has a good career? What do they do?
What do you think is the worst job is and why?
What skills are good to know in order to imporve your career?
